# Mirza Muhammad Mobeen

> Project Manager, Software Developer, Team Lead, and Google Certified Digital Marketer based in Rawalpindi, Pakistan.

## About

Mirza Muhammad Mobeen (also known as Mirza M Mobeen) is a versatile professional with expertise in project management, software development, team leadership, and digital marketing. He is a Google Certified Digital Marketer and founder of a charity organization. Currently working as a Software Developer at Sanwa Comtec K.K, Japan, leading the Pakistan team on Robotic Process Automation (RPA) and Industrial Software Automation projects.

**Software Developer** at Sanwa Comtec K.K, Japan (July 2025 - Present)
